class.name: CRTShader
class.brief_description: Post-process effect class that implements a simple CRT-screen-like effect.
class.description: Post-process effect class that implements a simple CRT-screen-like effect. The user may control the curvature, the vignette and the brightness.
class.members:
<member name="m_curvature" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="7.0"> Controls the curvature of the fake CRT-screen effect.
<member name="m_vignette_mul" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="2.0"> Controls the multiplier variable of the vignette for the CRT effect.
<member name="m_brightness" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.9"> Controls the brightness of the CRT effect.
